change_description: Assessment-driven revisions: (1) Added Semantic Scholar as 7th source, removed AIS eLibrary; (2) Added Cohen's κ inter-rater reliability metric with κ≥0.70 threshold; (3) Justified two-block search design; (4) Added explicit grey literature policy; (5) Added English-only language restriction; (6) Extended extraction codebook with 20 Hoefler-framework fields for Stage B; (7) Added GRADE-adapted certainty-of-evidence assessment; (8) Added pilot screening documentation plan and calibration log template

change_description: Rewrote for single-reviewer design with 4 mitigations: supervisor subset validation (15-20%); calibration round; re-screening after time gap; borderline-case escalation

change_description: Renamed rubric columns: q_baseline → q_classical_baseline_risk; q_justification → q_advantage_evidence_risk; adopted SEGRESS risk-of-bias language (Kitchenham et al. 2023)

change_description: Reframed from GRADE-adapted to domain-specific certainty-of-evidence framework; added explicit rationale citing Kitchenham & Charters (2007) and Dybå & Dingsøyr (2008)

change_description: Added reporting bias assessment section per PRISMA 2020 Items 13a/19
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A2: (1) Removed max_results cap — all sources now fetch complete result sets per SLR completeness requirements (Kitchenham & Charters 2007); (2) OpenAlex switched from full-text search= to title_and_abstract.search filter to align with standard SLR field-restricted searching (TITLE-ABS-KEY equivalent); (3) Scopus recommended query template added — tightened specific leaking terms (derivative→derivative pricing, trading→algorithmic trading, banking removed, hedging→hedge fund/financial hedging) while preserving high-recall terms (Monte Carlo, portfolio phrases, finance/financial); (4) arXiv category filtering remains opt-in only (not applied by default) per protocol §7 design rationale of maximising recall at search stage. Pilot runs showed 10k+ capped results across three sources with estimated >80% noise from incidental full-text matches and generic term overlap with quantum chemistry/physics.
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A4: Screening design changed from single-reviewer with 4 mitigations to two-reviewer calibrate-then-split (50-record calibration round with κ ≥ 0.70 target; remaining records split equally; borderline escalation; re-screening after gap). §8b rewritten from single-reviewer limitations to split-screening limitations. Screening Excel workbooks generated.
author: TVW

change_description: Major restructuring: (1) SLR repositioned as Phase 1a within exploratory sequential mixed-methods design (Creswell & Creswell 2018) — added §0b; (2) Two-stage design (Stage A/Stage B) collapsed into single-stage SLR with tiered extraction (Tier 1: evidence mapping for all papers; Tier 2: Hoefler advantage assessment for papers with quantitative evaluation); (3) §9 eligibility criteria unified with tier2_applicable flag replacing Stage B gate; (4) Added cross-cutting RQ6; (5) Added objective 5; (6) Added §12 outputs for cross-method synthesis. SLR search screening dedup and analytical framework unchanged.
author: TVW

change_description: Amendment A5 — Search query refinement to reduce noise: Block 1 changes: (1) Replaced bare Grover with "Grover's algorithm" OR "Grover search"; (2) Replaced bare HHL with "HHL algorithm" OR "Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd"; (3) Added "quantum phase estimation"; (4) Added "quantum neural network*". Block 2 changes: (5) Removed "Monte Carlo" (matched QMC physics papers); (6) Removed "risk analysis" (too generic); (7) Added "interest rate" OR "bond pricing" OR "fixed income". Previous v2 search runs deprecated; re-running with refined query.
author: TVW
